title: Arf NGE Platinum Perfect Platinum Platinum Perfect Plat
display_title: Arf NGE Platinum Perfect Platinum Platinum Perfect Plat
wikitext:
[]: Arf? NGE Platinum Perfect Platinum Platinum Perfect Plat...             Quote Post by JP » Wed Dec 05, 2007 10:22 pm I had heard about a tin case for a re-release of Eva, but I had no idea it was currently out! http://www.walmart.com/catalog/product.do?dest=9999999997&product_id=8071561&sourceid=1500000000000003260390 http://dvd.ign.com/objects/142/14220221.html Pretty cool if you don't have the show, or uh, have the show but want the extras. Still no remastered version of the movies though (as expected). Oh well. Just buy it anyway, Gainax loves you. Come on. Come onn

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Dec 08, 2007 11:57 am It's basically just a repackage. They did it to Nadia too.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Dec 09, 2007 8:25 am And Abenobashi Magical Shopping Arcade.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Dec 09, 2007 3:10 pm Well thank goodness I've only bought the D&R/EoE boxset so far.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Dec 10, 2007 9:26 am I bought that one It doesnt come with any booklets just 7 slim fit DVD cases inside a tin box

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Dec 18, 2007 2:13 pm EvaCub wrote: just 7 slim fit DVD cases inside a tin box

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Dec 18, 2007 2:17 pm duhr, it looks cool!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 18, 2007 2:17 pm It's ADV, do you really have to ask?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 18, 2007 2:22 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: It's ADV, do you really have to ask?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 18, 2007 3:58 pm Atleast Gainax hasn't released like 5 versions of Renewal yet...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 18, 2007 5:39 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Atleast Gainax hasn't released like 5 versions of Renewal yet...

[]:             Quote Post by kaji kun » Tue Dec 18, 2007 9:48 pm I got it, but only because I didn't own Eva previously on DVD. Overall it's not bad, but I do regret paying the extra money just for the crappy special features....some of the presumptions Greenfield makes are just off his rocker.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 18, 2007 11:09 pm In before Dr. Nick's "Mr. Greenfingers" pic and NAvery's "Mythology of Eva on Crack".

[]:             Quote Post by Matt_Colly » Wed Dec 19, 2007 2:18 am did anyone pick up the ADV 10th ann. box set last year with the "plethora of commemorative items" and limited edition jacket? it retailed for around $250...? I just want to know if you wear the jacket everyday, haha.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 19, 2007 2:22 am I don't think it was ever sold. They announced it, but never released it, for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Matt_Colly » Wed Dec 19, 2007 2:24 am Ornette wrote: I don't think it was ever sold. They announced it, but never released it, for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by rain1776 » Thu Dec 20, 2007 10:55 pm not even sure if that is real. first of all, i got errors. second, there are about 15 typos.

[]:             Quote Post by Matt_Colly » Fri Dec 21, 2007 1:10 am rain1776 wrote: not even sure if that is real. first of all, i got errors. second, there are about 15 typos.
